## MCP Server Submission

**Server name:** `marketplace/{your-name}/{server-name}-mcp-server`

**Description:**
<!-- What does your server do? What API/service does it connect to? -->

**Author:** <!-- Your name/org -->
**License:** <!-- MIT, Apache-2.0, etc. -->

### Tools provided

<!-- List all tools your server exposes -->
| Tool | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `tool_name` | What it does |

### Environment variables

| Variable | Required | Description |
|----------|----------|-------------|
| `API_KEY` | Yes | API key for the service |

### Checklist

- [ ] Server builds cleanly (`npm run build`)
- [ ] README includes description, tools, env vars, and usage example
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or API keys
- [ ] No `node_modules/` or `dist/` committed
- [ ] License file included
- [ ] Only files under `marketplace/{my-name}/` are modified
